text:
FreeBSD-13.2-RELEASE-p9
mate-1.26.0_2
firefox-121.0,2

When using the print function Firefox takes an extremely long time (minutes) to present a preview.

Other browsers (iridium, librewolf) do not exhibit this behaviour.  CUPS is installed and working without issue from the desktop.
